warnings: Performance warnings for bundle size (expected, not blocking)

syncStatus.notes: TSX and PHP structure remain synced. Pagination changes only affect PHP template and global CSS. TSX uses FilteredServerSideRender which previews PHP output including pagination.

testPage.notes: Existing test page unchanged - fixes applied to pagination template and global navigation styles

fixesApplied.userRequest: The page navigation is not following the design
fixesApplied.description: Pagination did not match Figma design - was only showing prev/next with mid_size:0 end_size:0, page number cells had wrong sizing, next/prev buttons not styled as circular gradient buttons, progress bar gradient not applying correctly

changes.notes: Now shows: 1, 2, 3, 4, ..., > (first page, 2 pages around current, dots, next arrow). Matches Figma design showing multiple page numbers.

changes.issue: 2. Page number cells need proper sizing (71x61px, px:32 py:24)
changes.after: min-w-[71px] min-h-[61px] px-8 py-6 text-[12px] font-medium border-charcoal
changes.notes: Cell dimensions: 71px wide x 61px tall per Figma. Padding: px-8 (32px horizontal) py-6 (24px vertical). Font: 12px medium Roboto. Border: charcoal. Current state: bg-charcoal text-white. Hover: bg-charcoal text-white.

changes.issue: 3. Next/prev buttons should be circular with gradient
changes.before: border, square shape, p-3, pseudo-element arrows with border
changes.after: w-10 h-10 rounded-full, gradient background (neon-green to blue), white arrow pseudo-elements, border-0, scale on hover
changes.notes: Circular 40x40px buttons per Figma. Background: linear-gradient(135deg, neon-green 0%, blue 100%). White arrow pseudo-elements using border technique. Prev: left arrow (border-l + border-t, -rotate-45). Next: right arrow (border-r + border-t, rotate-45). Hover: scale-110. Text labels sr-only.
Progress bar CSS already correct: width calc(var(--progress, 0) * 1%) with gradient background. PHP sets --progress custom property. Verified markup and CSS both correct.

globalStyling.notes: Per spec: 'The style for the pagination should be applied to the default WordPress pagination on the theme'. All pagination styling applied to global .navigation class in navigation.css, affecting both Search block AND any other WP pagination in theme.

implementationNotes.paginationNumbers: Increased end_size to 1 and mid_size to 2 to show more page numbers. Pattern: [first] [current-2] [current-1] [current] [current+1] [current+2] [...] [next arrow]. Cell sizing: 71x61px with 32px horizontal, 24px vertical padding per Figma. 12px Roboto Medium font. Charcoal border and text, charcoal bg when current/hover.
implementationNotes.prevNextButtons: Circular 40x40px buttons with gradient background (neon-green to blue diagonal gradient). White arrow pseudo-elements using CSS border technique. Prev: left-pointing arrow (border-l + border-t rotated -45deg). Next: right-pointing arrow (border-r + border-t rotated 45deg). Scale hover effect for interactivity. Text labels hidden with sr-only for accessibility.
implementationNotes.progressBar: Already implemented correctly. 4px tall (h-1), rounded-[10px], track bg charcoal/50, fill gradient neon-green to blue. Width calculated as (current_page / total_pages) * 100% via --progress CSS custom property set in PHP. Gradient applies correctly via Search.css rule.
implementationNotes.globalStyles: Pagination styles in resources/css/screen/navigation.css apply globally to .navigation.pagination class, affecting all WordPress pagination across theme (not just Search block). This follows spec requirement: 'The style for the pagination should be applied to the default wordpress pagination on the theme'.
implementationNotes.dotsEllipsis: Added border-0 to .dots class so ellipsis (...) appears without border, matching Figma design.
implementationNotes.responsiveness: Pagination remains horizontally scrollable on mobile via flex-wrap. Page numbers and arrows maintain sizing. Progress bar stretches full width below pagination.
implementationNotes.accessibility: Prev/next button text labels remain in DOM with sr-only class for screen readers. Visual arrows via pseudo-elements. Current page has .current class with bg-charcoal text-white. All interactive elements keyboard accessible.

figmaCompliance.displayedPages: Shows 1, 2, 3, 4, ..., > (first, pages around current, ellipsis, next) matching Figma design
figmaCompliance.nextArrowStyle: Circular gradient button with white arrow matching Figma gradient element
figmaCompliance.progressBarBehavior: Width proportional to current_page / total_pages as specified in Figma measurements

verificationSteps: Build compiled successfully with no errors (performance warnings only)
TSX/PHP structure sync verified - no structural changes to block wrapper
Pagination PHP args verified: end_size:1, mid_size:2 shows multiple page numbers
Global navigation.css updated with Figma-compliant cell sizing (71x61px)
Circular gradient buttons verified: w-10 h-10 rounded-full with gradient bg
Progress bar CSS verified: working correctly with --progress custom property
Global pagination styles apply to .navigation class (theme-wide per spec)
